Title: Slug Patrol
Rules: Banana slugs spawn scattered across yard and forest; walk within 1.1m to collect; slugs wiggle and drift slowly; +5 pts each
CompletionText: All slugs relocated to the Slug Sanctuary (a bucket)!

Title: Toy Tornado
Rules: Toys (balls, blocks, rubber ducks) scattered in yard; one is The LEGO — collecting it while grounded launches the player (OW!) and awards sympathy points; +5 pts each
CompletionText: Yard secured! Not a single LEGO left behind.

Title: Dinner Time!
Rules: All four kids flee from the controlled parent within 8m at 92% speed; tag within 1.5m to catch; caught kids wait at the porch; +10 pts each
CompletionText: All four kids captured — er, seated for dinner! Spaghetti for the win!

Title: Coffee Emergency
Rules: Two mugs on the front porch; carry one at a time (right hand socket) to each parent within 1.8m; +15 pts each; parents too under-caffeinated to move
CompletionText: Caffeine levels restored. The parents can parent again!

Title: Forest Cup
Rules: Run into the soccer ball to kick (running kicks stronger: 8-11 m/s + 3.5 up); score into the white goal at west yard (2.4m wide); +5 pts and confetti per goal
CompletionText: Forest Cup CHAMPION! The redwoods sway in celebration!
